name: Harmonia - Lead Reactivation Part B: Follow-up Email

parameters.filterByFormula: =AND(NOT({Last SMS Sent} = BLANK()), DATETIME_DIFF(NOW(), {Last SMS Sent}, 'hours') >= 24, DATETIME_DIFF(NOW(), {Last SMS Sent}, 'hours') <= 48, {Email Follow-up Sent} != TRUE(), {Has Replied} != TRUE(), {Do Not Contact} != TRUE(), {Email} != '')
